message:
fix: reject empty title and empty label on update/label add (GH#1994)

- `bd update <id> --title ""` now errors instead of silently blanking
- `bd update <id> --title "   "` (whitespace-only) also rejected
- `bd label add <id> ""` now errors instead of adding empty label
- Values are trimmed before storage, not just for validation
- Includes fix for pre-existing doctor file formatting

Based on PR #1994 by @turian.

Co-Authored-By: Joseph Turian <turian@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
